message:
fix: Add BSD/macOS support for reverse_dns socket structures

BSD-derived systems (macOS, FreeBSD, OpenBSD, NetBSD, DragonFly) use
4.4BSD socket structures which differ from Linux/POSIX:

- sockaddr_in/sockaddr_in6 have an extra sin_len/sin6_len field (u8)
- sin_family/sin6_family is u8 instead of u16

Added conditional compilation (#[cfg]) to handle both variants in the
reverse_dns function.

Fixes #6

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -5201,6 +5201,31 @@ fn reverse_dns(ip: IpAddr) -> Option<String> {
         match ip {
             IpAddr::V4(v4) => {
                 let octets = v4.octets();
+                // BSD-derived systems (macOS, FreeBSD, etc.) have sin_len field and u8 sin_family
+                #[cfg(any(
+                    target_os = "macos",
+                    target_os = "freebsd",
+                    target_os = "openbsd",
+                    target_os = "netbsd",
+                    target_os = "dragonfly"
+                ))]
+                let addr = libc::sockaddr_in {
+                    sin_len: std::mem::size_of::<libc::sockaddr_in>() as u8,
+                    sin_family: libc::AF_INET as u8,
+                    sin_port: 0,
+                    sin_addr: libc::in_addr {
+                        s_addr: u32::from_be_bytes(octets),
+                    },
+                    sin_zero: [0; 8],
+                };
+                // Linux and other POSIX systems use u16 sin_family and no sin_len
+                #[cfg(not(any(
+                    target_os = "macos",
+                    target_os = "freebsd",
+                    target_os = "openbsd",
+                    target_os = "netbsd",
+                    target_os = "dragonfly"
+                )))]
                 let addr = libc::sockaddr_in {
                     sin_family: libc::AF_INET as u16,
                     sin_port: 0,
@@ -5223,6 +5248,32 @@ fn reverse_dns(ip: IpAddr) -> Option<String> {
                 }
             }
             IpAddr::V6(v6) => {
+                // BSD-derived systems have sin6_len field and u8 sin6_family
+                #[cfg(any(
+                    target_os = "macos",
+                    target_os = "freebsd",
+                    target_os = "openbsd",
+                    target_os = "netbsd",
+                    target_os = "dragonfly"
+                ))]
+                let addr = libc::sockaddr_in6 {
+                    sin6_len: std::mem::size_of::<libc::sockaddr_in6>() as u8,
+                    sin6_family: libc::AF_INET6 as u8,
+                    sin6_port: 0,
+                    sin6_flowinfo: 0,
+                    sin6_addr: libc::in6_addr {
+                        s6_addr: v6.octets(),
+                    },
+                    sin6_scope_id: 0,
+                };
+                // Linux and other POSIX systems
+                #[cfg(not(any(
+                    target_os = "macos",
+                    target_os = "freebsd",
+                    target_os = "openbsd",
+                    target_os = "netbsd",
+                    target_os = "dragonfly"
+                )))]
                 let addr = libc::sockaddr_in6 {
                     sin6_family: libc::AF_INET6 as u16,
                     sin6_port: 0,
